name: Target Hit
description: Weapon finding its mark with impact confirmation

prompts.label: weapon finding its mark with bright impact confirmation flash
prompts.text: weapon finding its mark with bright impact confirmation flash, futuristic spacecraft interface, crystalline FM synthesis bell, otherworldly precision, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay

prompts.label: plasma bolt connecting with target in burst of energy

prompts.label: shields absorbing impact with dissipating energy ripple
prompts.text: shields absorbing impact with dissipating energy ripple, quantum computer hum, plasma crackle discharge, alien intelligence awakening, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, studio-grade, with natural decay
